channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why are people attacking Ebola clinics? It's about trust, death, and body bags
item.description: Echoing past outbreaks, community members are attacking clinics, distrusting doctors, and following burial traditions that could increase cases.

item.title: How we're coping with high gas prices, according to Costco and Walmart
item.description: Sky-high gas prices are driving drivers to seek discounts at the pump. Oil executives warn that even higher prices may be coming.

item.title: Asia defense summit begins amid uncertainty over U.S. focus
item.description: The Shangri-La Dialogue, organized by the International Institute for Strategic Studies, will also cover Middle East tensions and Russia's war in Ukraine.

item.title: Israel and Lebanon officials to meet; judge upholds Trump mail-in voting order
item.description: Israel and Lebanon officials are scheduled to meet as U.S.-Iran peace talks continue. A federal judge declined to block Trump's executive order on mail-in voting.
